name: Separium: 12th Elevator
short_description: You are the Administrator of Separium. Complete AI Purry's mission to assess anomalies in the elevator and reach the Administrator's Office on the 12th floor.
detailed_description:
You are the Administrator of Separium. Complete AI Purry's mission—to assess anomalies in the elevator—and reach the Administrator's Office on the 12th floor.

Follow these steps to proceed:

  • Rotate counterclockwise and memorize the elements that belong to the Separium elevator.

  • Determine if this elevator is normal or anomalous.

    • If it is normal, choose to "Retain" the elevator.

    • If it is anomalous, exit through the door to escape from the elevator.

  • If your judgment is correct, the elevator will ascend one floor.

  • Upon reaching the 12th floor, review Purry's final question.

  • Based on your answer, Purry will decide whether you qualify as the Administrator.

/
Separium: 12th Elevator is a game simulation set in the fictional space of Separium within Team Pearl’s sci-fi universe, Sepafuturism. It draws inspiration from the liminal space genre and The Exit 8.
